info.title: Copace
info.description: Track your GitHub Copilot Premium usage pace from the command line.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Copace — Track your GitHub Copilot Premium usage pace.

options.name: --include-weekends
options.description: Include weekend days in the pace calculation (default: weekdays only). [default: False]

options.name: --date
options.description: Override today's date for testing (format: yyyy-MM-dd).

arguments.name: usage
arguments.description: Your current Copilot Premium usage percentage (e.g. 42.5).
